mapper.select: SELECT ifnull(sum(d.supplier_settlement),0) as total FROM lkt_order_details d left join lkt_order as o on d.r_sNo = o.sNo LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS p ON p.id = d.p_id WHERE o.status = 5 AND o.settlement_status = 0 AND o.store_id = #{storeId} AND p.gongyingshang = #{supplierId} AND o.is_lssued = 1
